The Story

Why I Started ZmaxLab

I've spent years watching brilliant healthcare practitioners struggle to get found online — not because they're not good at what they do, but because no affordable digital option existed for solo practitioners.

ZmaxLab exists to fix that. One person, one mission: give every NPI-registered practitioner across all 50 US states a website that actually works.

A nurse practitioner I knew had just opened her own practice after 10 years in a hospital. She was incredible at her job — patients loved her, referrals were strong. But online? She was invisible. Her only web presence was a 2-page PDF resume.

That's when I stepped in.

5 days
Website built
$500
Flat fee
#3
Google ranking
4-6/wk
New patient leads

She told two colleagues. Then three more. Then I realised this was a real problem — and I was in a unique position to solve it for a lot of practitioners who had the same story.

What I Believe

Values That Drive Every Build

Healthcare First

Every decision - design, copy, features - is made through the lens of what helps practitioners get more patients.

Hand-Coded Quality

No WordPress, no templates, no page builders. Every line of code is written for your specific practice.

Transparent Pricing

One price. No surprises. No hidden fees, no upsells on calls, no nickel-and-diming. $500 is $500.

My Commitment

What I Promise Every Client

Promise 01

I will personally build every page of your website - nothing is outsourced

Promise 02

You will receive a design mockup before a single line of code is written

Promise 03

Your website will be live within 7 days of content submission

Promise 04

You will own your website completely - source code, hosting, everything

Promise 05

One post-launch revision is always included at no extra cost

Let's build your practice's future online.

Book a free 30-minute call. I'll review your current presence and show you exactly what your website could look like.

ZmaxLab provides custom healthcare website design for NPI practitioners across all 50 US states including Texas, California, Florida, New York, Illinois, Pennsylvania, Ohio, Georgia, North Carolina, Michigan, New Jersey, Virginia, Washington, Arizona, Tennessee, Massachusetts, Indiana, Missouri, Maryland, Wisconsin, Colorado, Minnesota, South Carolina, Alabama, Louisiana, Kentucky, Oregon, Oklahoma, Connecticut, Utah, Iowa, Nevada, Arkansas, Mississippi, Kansas, New Mexico, Nebraska, Idaho, West Virginia, Hawaii, New Hampshire, Maine, Montana, Rhode Island, Delaware, South Dakota, North Dakota, Alaska, Vermont, and Wyoming. Specialties: nurse practitioners (NPs), family nurse practitioners (FNPs), psychiatric nurse practitioners, physician assistants (PA-C), mental health therapists, LCSW, chiropractors (DC), dentists, orthodontists, physical therapists (PT), occupational therapists (OT), speech-language pathologists. HIPAA-aware web design. Healthcare SEO. NPI directory listings.
